title: [Launched] Update: Egress and data transfer with Azure in the United Kingdom
description:
We support customer choice, including the choice to transfer
your data between Azure and environments outside of Azure. Azure has offered free egress
and at-cost data
transfer for customers and CSP partners in Europe transferring data via the
internet bet
